headline: Replace a $90K Salary With Dividend Income: The $1.5M Strategy Explained
summary: At 6% yield, a $1.5 million portfolio produces $90,000 per year. That is achievable today with real income investments. The harder question is whether $1.5 million is what you actually need, or whether you could get there with less, and what you give up to do it. The Conservative Floor: Sleep Well, Save More At ... Replace a $90K Salary With Dividend Income: The $1.5M Strategy Explained
